<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ja">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif+JP:wght@300;400&family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;1,300;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
html, body { height: 100%; overflow: hidden; }

body {
  background: #f2efe8;
  font-family: 'Noto Serif JP', 'Georgia', serif;
  color: #1c1a16;
}

/* ============ LAYOUT ============ */
.fv-wrap {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 100vh;
}

/* NAV */
.fv-nav {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 28px 52px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #d8d4ca;
  background: #f2efe8;
  z-index: 100;
}
.fv-logo {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 22px; font-weight: 300;
  letter-spacing: .22em; color: #1c1a16;
}
.fv-nav-links {
  display: flex; gap: 40px; align-items: center;
}
.fv-nav-links a {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 12px; font-weight: 300;
  letter-spacing: .16em; color: #9a9080; text-decoration: none;
  transition: color .2s;
}
.fv-nav-links a:hover { color: #1c1a16; }
.fv-nav-lang {
  font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: .18em; color: #b8b0a4;
  border-left: 1px solid #ccc8be; padding-left: 20px; margin-left: 4px;
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-weight: 300;
}

/* HERO */
.fv-hero {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  flex: 1;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* ============ LEFT (固定) ============ */
.fv-left {
  border-right: 1px solid #d8d4ca;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.fv-left-content {
  padding: 52px 52px 40px;
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.fv-eyebrow {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 10px; font-weight: 300;
  letter-spacing: .28em; color: #b8b0a4; text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 44px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;
}
.fv-eyebrow::before {
  content: ''; display: inline-block;
  width: 28px; height: 1px; background: #c8c4ba;
}
.fv-copy-ja {
  font-family: 'Noto Serif JP', serif;
  font-size: 27px; font-weight: 300;
  line-height: 1.72; letter-spacing: .08em; color: #1c1a16;
}
.fv-copy-ja .en-italic {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-style: italic; font-size: 31px; font-weight: 300;
  color: #8a8278; letter-spacing: .03em;
  display: block; margin-top: 4px;
}
.fv-body {
  font-family: 'Noto Serif JP', serif;
  font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 300;
  line-height: 2.3; color: #a09888;
  margin-top: 40px; max-width: 300px;
}
.fv-cta-area {
  margin-top: auto;
  border-top: 1px solid #e0dcd4;
}
.fv-cta-row {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 19px 52px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e0dcd4;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background .18s;
}
.fv-cta-row:hover { background: #ece9e2; }
.fv-cta-label {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 13px; font-weight: 300;
  letter-spacing: .18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #3c3830;
}
.fv-cta-arrow { font-size: 15px; color: #c0b8b0; }

/* ============ RIGHT (スクロール) ============ */
.fv-right {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* スクロールトラック — 写真を縦に並べる */
.fv-scroll-track {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  will-change: transform;
  transition: transform 1.0s cubic-bezier(0.77, 0, 0.175, 1);
}

.fv-slide {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100vh; /* 1枚 = ビューポート高さと同じ */
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* ナビ分を引く */
.fv-slide { height: calc(100vh - 77px); }

.fv-slide img {
  width: 100%; height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover; object-position: center;
  display: block;
  transition: transform 8s ease-out;
}

/* ゆるやかなケンバーンズ */
.fv-slide.active img {
  transform: scale(1.04);
}
.fv-slide:not(.active) img {
  transform: scale(1.0);
}

/* キャプション */
.fv-caption {
  position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  padding: 32px 36px;
  background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(12,10,8,.58));
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity .6s ease .3s;
}
.fv-slide.active .fv-caption { opacity: 1; }

.fv-caption-tag {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: .26em; text-transform: uppercase;
  font-weight: 300; color: rgba(255,255,255,.55);
}
.fv-caption-title {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 13px; font-weight: 300;
  letter-spacing: .1em; color: rgba(255,255,255,.8);
}

/* スライドインジケーター */
.fv-indicator {
  position: absolute;
  right: 28px; top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;
  z-index: 20;
}
.fv-ind-dot {
  width: 3px; height: 24px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.25);
  transition: background .4s, height .4s;
  cursor: pointer;
  border-radius: 2px;
}
.fv-ind-dot.active {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.75);
  height: 36px;
}

/* スクロールヒント */
.fv-scroll-hint {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 28px; right: 28px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  z-index: 20;
  opacity: 1;
  transition: opacity .5s;
}
.fv-scroll-hint.hide { opacity: 0; }
.fv-scroll-hint-text {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: .22em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.45); font-weight: 300;
}
.fv-scroll-hint-icon {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 3px;
}
.fv-scroll-hint-wheel {
  width: 14px; height: 20px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.35);
  border-radius: 7px;
  position: relative;
}
.fv-scroll-hint-ball {
  width: 3px; height: 5px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.5);
  border-radius: 2px;
  position: absolute;
  top: 3px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
  animation: ballScroll 1.6s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes ballScroll {
  0%, 100% { top: 3px; opacity: 1; }
  60% { top: 9px; opacity: .4; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="fv-wrap">

  <!-- NAV -->
  <nav class="fv-nav">
    <div class="fv-logo">FUTURITY</div>
    <div class="fv-nav-links">
      <a href="#">Works</a>
      <a href="#">Philosophy</a>
      <a href="#">Team</a>
      <a href="#">About</a>
      <span class="fv-nav-lang">JP / EN</span>
    </div>
  </nav>

  <!-- HERO -->
  <div class="fv-hero">

    <!-- 左：固定コンテンツ -->
    <div class="fv-left">
      <div class="fv-left-content">
        <div class="fv-eyebrow">Creative Design Studio, Minamiaoyama</div>
        <div>
          <h1 class="fv-copy-ja">
            個が集まり、<br>
            <span class="en-italic">空間をつくる。</span>
          </h1>
          <p class="fv-body">
            意匠設計・インテリアデザインを軸に、<br>
            フラットな専門家たちが<br>
            一つひとつの空間と向き合う。
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fv-cta-area">
        <div class="fv-cta-row">
          <span class="fv-cta-label">Works を見る</span>
          <span class="fv-cta-arrow">→</span>
        </div>
        <div class="fv-cta-row">
          <span class="fv-cta-label">まずはご相談ください</span>
          <span class="fv-cta-arrow">→</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 右：スクロール写真エリア -->
    <div class="fv-right" id="photoRight">

      <div class="fv-scroll-track" id="scrollTrack">

        <div class="fv-slide active" data-index="0">
          <img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="Residence interior">
          <div class="fv-caption">
            <span class="fv-caption-tag">Residence</span>
            <span class="fv-caption-title">邸宅エントランス — 東京都港区</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="fv-slide" data-index="1">
          <img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="Lounge interior">
          <div class="fv-caption">
            <span class="fv-caption-tag">Commercial</span>
            <span class="fv-caption-title">ラウンジ内装 — エントランスホール</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="fv-slide" data-index="2">
          <img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="Coworking space">
          <div class="fv-caption">
            <span class="fv-caption-tag">Office</span>
            <span class="fv-caption-title">コワーキングスペース — 共用デザイン</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="fv-slide" data-index="3">
          <img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="Entrance at night">
          <div class="fv-caption">
            <span class="fv-caption-tag">Residence</span>
            <span class="fv-caption-title">エントランスホール — 光と素材の対話</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="fv-slide" data-index="4">
          <img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="Building exterior at dusk">
          <div class="fv-caption">
            <span class="fv-caption-tag">Commercial</span>
            <span class="fv-caption-title">集合住宅 外観夜景 — Good Design Award</span>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <!-- インジケーター -->
      <div class="fv-indicator" id="indicator">
        <div class="fv-ind-dot active" data-i="0"></div>
        <div class="fv-ind-dot" data-i="1"></div>
        <div class="fv-ind-dot" data-i="2"></div>
        <div class="fv-ind-dot" data-i="3"></div>
        <div class="fv-ind-dot" data-i="4"></div>
      </div>

      <!-- スクロールヒント -->
      <div class="fv-scroll-hint" id="scrollHint">
        <span class="fv-scroll-hint-text">Scroll</span>
        <div class="fv-scroll-hint-icon">
          <div class="fv-scroll-hint-wheel">
            <div class="fv-scroll-hint-ball"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
  const TOTAL = 5;
  let current = 0;
  let isAnimating = false;
  let slideH = 0;
  let hintHidden = false;

  const track = document.getElementById('scrollTrack');
  const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.fv-slide');
  const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.fv-ind-dot');
  const hint = document.getElementById('scrollHint');
  const rightEl = document.getElementById('photoRight');

  function getSlideH() {
    return rightEl.clientHeight;
  }

  function goTo(idx) {
    if (isAnimating || idx === current) return;
    if (idx < 0 || idx >= TOTAL) return;
    isAnimating = true;

    slides[current].classList.remove('active');
    dots[current].classList.remove('active');

    current = idx;

    slides[current].classList.add('active');
    dots[current].classList.add('active');

    slideH = getSlideH();
    track.style.transform = 'translateY(-' + (current * slideH) + 'px)';

    if (!hintHidden) {
      hint.classList.add('hide');
      hintHidden = true;
    }

    setTimeout(() => { isAnimating = false; }, 1050);
  }

  // ホイールイベント（右エリアのみ）
  let wheelAccum = 0;
  let wheelTimer = null;

  rightEl.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    wheelAccum += e.deltaY;
    clearTimeout(wheelTimer);
    wheelTimer = setTimeout(() => {
      if (wheelAccum > 40) {
        goTo(current + 1);
      } else if (wheelAccum < -40) {
        goTo(current - 1);
      }
      wheelAccum = 0;
    }, 60);
  }, { passive: false });

  // タッチ操作
  let touchStartY = 0;
  rightEl.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
    touchStartY = e.touches[0].clientY;
  }, { passive: true });
  rightEl.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
    const dy = touchStartY - e.changedTouches[0].clientY;
    if (dy > 40) goTo(current + 1);
    else if (dy < -40) goTo(current - 1);
  }, { passive: true });

  // ドットクリック
  dots.forEach(d => {
    d.addEventListener('click', () => goTo(parseInt(d.dataset.i)));
  });

  // キーボード（フォーカス時）
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') goTo(current + 1);
    if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') goTo(current - 1);
  });

  // 初期化
  function init() {
    slideH = getSlideH();
    track.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
    slides[0].classList.add('active');
  }

  window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
    slideH = getSlideH();
    track.style.transition = 'none';
    track.style.transform = 'translateY(-' + (current * slideH) + 'px)';
    setTimeout(() => {
      track.style.transition = 'transform 1.0s cubic-bezier(0.77, 0, 0.175, 1)';
    }, 50);
  });

  init();
})();
</script>

</body>
</html>
